result:
**Goal: Add a multi-grid side-by-side comparison mode that runs two simulations simultaneously with different rules on the same initial pattern, so you can visually compare how different cellular automata rulesets evolve the same starting configuration.**

This is a natural next feature — the project already supports multiple rule presets and custom rules, but there's no way to directly compare them. A split-screen view (triggered by a new keybinding like `V`) would let you pick two rulesets, seed them with the same pattern, and watch them diverge in real time. It would make the rule editor and preset system significantly more useful and educational.

Want me to implement this?
